items.title: Safari Adds scrollend Event Support, Completing Baseline Browser Coverage
items.summaryShort: Safari Adds scrollend Event Support, Completing Baseline Browser Coverage. Safari's release of version 26.2 in December introduced support for the scrollend event, completing its alignment with major browsers.

items.title: Snap gets closer to releasing new AI glasses after years-long hiatus
items.summaryShort: Snap gets closer to releasing new AI glasses after years-long hiatus. Specs has long been teasing the next version of its augmented reality glasses.

items.title: ChatGPT finally offers $100/month Pro plan
items.summaryShort: ChatGPT finally offers $100/month Pro plan. OpenAI announced on Thursday something that power users have been asking for: a $100/month plan.
